forbidden_patterns: PostgREST .eq/.neq/.in/.filter on column 'status'|'progression_decision'|'status_legacy' with judging-outcome literal
approved_replacements: publicStatus / publicPlacement props passed from gated parent
notes: Baseline empty: rule + DIR_ALLOWLIST + FILE_ALLOWLIST already cover every legitimate raw reader.
ANY new raw read outside the allowlists will fail CI immediately (no grace period).
When adding a new legitimate raw reader: append to FILE_ALLOWLIST in eslint-rules/no-raw-entry-status.js with one-line justification — never widen DIR_ALLOWLIST.
